data.description: Array of data objects to pivot.

config.description: Configuration with rows, columns, values, and optional filters.

fieldDefinitions.description: Defines field types, labels, editors, templates, and validators.

onConfigChange.description: Called when user changes pivot configuration via drag-drop.

showConfigPanel.description: Show the interactive drag-and-drop configuration panel.

editable.description: Enable inline cell editing on double-click.

onCellEdit.description: Validate or intercept cell edits. Return false to cancel.

plugins.description: Array of plugin objects for custom functions, renderers, and editors.

permissions.description: Fine-grained control over what users can do (drag, edit, filter, export).

cellTemplate.description: Global custom cell renderer for all value cells.

exportable.description: Show CSV/JSON export buttons in toolbar.

expandAll.description: Expand all row groups on initial render.

showGrandTotal.description: Show a grand total row at the bottom.

showSubTotals.description: Show subtotal rows for expanded groups.

compact.description: Reduce cell padding for a denser layout.

showToolbar.description: Show toolbar with expand/collapse, export, and record count.
